definition.content:
[License types:](https://ravendb.net/buy)   
0 = None   
1 = Community   
2 = Reserved   
3 = Professional   
4 = Enterprise   
5 = Developer   
6 = Essential   
7 = EnterpriseAI   
-1= Invalid

#### About this dashboard : 
This dashboard provides an operational overview of RavenDB servers, databases, collections, and indexes.   
   
It is designed to answer practical questions:  
• Is the cluster healthy?  
• Are resources under pressure?   
• Are databases and indexes keeping up?  
• Is storage, memory, or indexing becoming a bottleneck?  

All metrics are collected directly from the RavenDB monitoring endpoints via the Datadog Agent.

**Resources & documentation**

RavenDB documentation:
https://ravendb.net/docs

Monitoring & metrics reference:
https://docs.ravendb.net/server/administration/monitoring/prometheus

Datadog integration source:
https://github.com/DataDog/integrations-extras

Troubleshooting tip:
When investigating issues, correlate spikes across Resource Utilization, Databases, and Indexes sections.

definition.title: Cluster Elections (Term Changes)
definition.description: Number of Raft term changes per interval (leader elections)

definition.title: GC Pause %
definition.description: Time spent paused for GC since previous collection
